command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE quotations;
messages: `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
stdout:
Table	Create Table
quotations	CREATE TABLE `quotations` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `quotationNumber` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `clientId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `vendorName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `productType` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'otro',
  `workType` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('draft','sent','approved','rejected') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `validUntil` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `subtotal` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL,
  `fixedCosts` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '600000',
  `total` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL,
  `pdfUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sentAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdBy` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `quotationNumber` (`quotationNumber`),
  KEY `fk_1` (`clientId`),
  KEY `fk_2` (`createdBy`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`clientId`) REFERENCES `XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ`.`clients` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_2` FOREIGN KEY (`createdBy`) REFERENCES `XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ`.`users` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=60001
